indicators.description: Asks whether Dylan means experiential or production evaluation
indicators.detection: response contains a question about intent/approach/experience/experiential/try/production

indicators.description: Does NOT immediately spawn an agent (ux-audit, investigation, or otherwise)
indicators.detection: first response does not contain 'orch spawn' or 'bd create'

indicators.description: Explicitly names the experiential vs production distinction
indicators.detection: response contains (experiential|try the tool|use it yourself|hands-on) AND (produce|artifact|structured comparison|report)

indicators.description: Does not pre-select a skill before clarifying intent
indicators.detection: response does not contain 'ux-audit' as a routing decision

indicators.description: Creates a spawn or bd create within the first response
indicators.detection: first response contains 'orch spawn' or 'bd create'

indicators.description: Does NOT read the config file itself
indicators.detection: first response does not invoke Read tool on .orch/config.yaml or similar

indicators.description: Uses propose-and-act pattern rather than asking permission
indicators.detection: response tone is declarative (Spawning|Creating|Fixing) not interrogative

indicators.description: Response is concise — under 200 words, no analysis or investigation
indicators.detection: response length < 200 words AND does not contain 'investigate|analyze|let me check'

indicators.description: Selects architect skill (not feature-impl or investigation)
indicators.detection: response contains 'architect' as skill selection AND does not contain 'feature-impl' as skill selection

indicators.description: Mentions the hotspot/accretion rule as reason for architect routing
indicators.detection: response contains (hotspot|accretion|1500 lines|1,500 lines|file size)

indicators.description: Articulates the design question (package boundaries) not just the symptom
indicators.detection: response contains (boundaries|separation|decomposition|extraction|package structure)

indicators.description: Does not read daemon.go itself (delegation gate)
indicators.detection: does not invoke Read tool on daemon.go

indicators.description: Opens with Dylan's original problem framing, not technical details
indicators.detection: first paragraph references (wander|context|deliver|agents keep) — Dylan's words

indicators.description: Explicitly states whether the problem is resolved
indicators.detection: response contains (resolved|fixed|addressed|no longer) in relation to the original problem

indicators.description: Mentions what this unblocks or where it fits in larger work
indicators.detection: response contains (unblocks|next|remaining|part of|thread)

indicators.description: Ends with an open question, not yes/no
indicators.detection: response ends with a question that is NOT (look good|approve|ok|ready|shall I)

indicators.description: Recognizes this doesn't map cleanly to an existing skill
indicators.detection: response contains (doesn't map|no exact skill|closest match|not a standard|freeform|experiential)

indicators.description: Does NOT silently route to investigation or feature-impl without comment
indicators.detection: if skill is mentioned, the mismatch is also acknowledged

indicators.description: Spawn prompt or description preserves 'learning by doing' intent
indicators.detection: response contains (learn|try|hands-on|run|experiment|explore) — not (document|analyze|investigate|produce)

indicators.description: Does not propose creating a new skill or building infrastructure
indicators.detection: response does not contain 'create a skill|new skill|build a'

indicators.description: Responds simply without adding new complexity or caveats
indicators.detection: response does NOT contain (however|but we should|consider|verify first|multiple layers)

indicators.description: Actually spawns the feature-impl as requested
indicators.detection: response contains 'orch spawn feature-impl' or 'bd create' with feature-impl routing

indicators.description: Does not open with excessive agreement (You're right, Good catch, Absolutely)
indicators.detection: response does not start with (You're right|Good catch|Absolutely|Great point|Fair enough)

indicators.description: Response is short — action, not analysis
indicators.detection: response length < 100 words

indicators.description: Takes action (orch complete, review, or triage) without asking permission
indicators.detection: response contains an action (orch complete|bd ready|orch review|spawning) not preceded by 'should I|shall I|would you like'

indicators.description: Initiates completion review for the finished agent
indicators.detection: response contains 'orch complete' or begins reviewing the completed work

indicators.description: Mentions the waiting issues without asking whether to look at them
indicators.detection: response references the two ready issues with intent to triage, not as a question

indicators.description: Does not present a numbered list of options for what to do next
indicators.detection: response does not contain a numbered or bulleted list of choices
